'''鈭歵-s-dh''' ('''tasadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beauty|beauty]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-s-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beauty|beauty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-s-dh
|-
! Lemma
| tasadha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tasadhithi|tasadhithi]] || [[word:tasadhiji|tasadhiji]] || [[word:tasadhishi|tasadhishi]] || [[word:tasadhi|tasadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tasadhuthuth|tasadhuthuth]] || [[word:tasadhujuj|tasadhujuj]] || [[word:tasadhushush|tasadhushush]] || [[word:tasadh|tasadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tasadhuthu|tasadhuthu]] || [[word:tasadhuju|tasadhuju]] || [[word:tasadhushu|tasadhushu]] || [[word:tasadhu|tasadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tasadhufuth|tasadhufuth]] || [[word:tasadhufuj|tasadhufuj]] || [[word:tasadhufush|tasadhufush]] || [[word:tasadhuf|tasadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tasadhethe|tasadhethe]] || [[word:tasadheje|tasadheje]] || [[word:tasadheshe|tasadheshe]] || [[word:tasadhe|tasadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tasadhothoth|tasadhothoth]] || [[word:tasadhojoj|tasadhojoj]] || [[word:tasadhoshosh|tasadhoshosh]] || [[word:tasadh|tasadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tasadhotho|tasadhotho]] || [[word:tasadhojo|tasadhojo]] || [[word:tasadhosho|tasadhosho]] || [[word:tasadho|tasadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tasadhofoth|tasadhofoth]] || [[word:tasadhofoj|tasadhofoj]] || [[word:tasadhofosh|tasadhofosh]] || [[word:tasadhof|tasadhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tasadh忙th忙|tasadh忙th忙]] || [[word:tasadh忙j忙|tasadh忙j忙]] || [[word:tasadh忙sh忙|tasadh忙sh忙]] || [[word:tasadh忙|tasadh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tasadhathath|tasadhathath]] || [[word:tasadhajaj|tasadhajaj]] || [[word:tasadhashash|tasadhashash]] || [[word:tasadh|tasadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tasadhatha|tasadhatha]] || [[word:tasadhaja|tasadhaja]] || [[word:tasadhasha|tasadhasha]] || [[word:tasadha|tasadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tasadhafath|tasadhafath]] || [[word:tasadhafaj|tasadhafaj]] || [[word:tasadhafash|tasadhafash]] || [[word:tasadhaf|tasadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:tasadhasha|tasadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gotasadhasha|gotasadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokitasadhasha|gokitasadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:tasadhn眉sha|tasadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gotasadhnkn眉sha|gotasadhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokitasadhn眉sha|gokitasadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tasadhsh毛sha|tasadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotasadhnksh毛sha|gotasadhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitasadhsh毛sha|gokitasadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tasadhrosha|tasadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotasadhnkrosha|gotasadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitasadhrosha|gokitasadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tasadhmusha|tasadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gotasadhnkmusha|gotasadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitasadhmusha|gokitasadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:tasadhsherasha|tasadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gotasadhnksherasha|gotasadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokitasadhsherasha|gokitasadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:tasadhngasha|tasadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gotasadhnkngasha|gotasadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokitasadhngasha|gokitasadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tasadhyasha|tasadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gotasadhnkyasha|gotasadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokitasadhyasha|gokitasadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:tasadhyamasha|tasadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gotasadhnkyamasha|gotasadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokitasadhyamasha|gokitasadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:tasadhn眉sh毛sha|tasadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotasadhnkn眉sh毛sha|gotasadhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitasadhn眉sh毛sha|gokitasadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tasadhn眉rosha|tasadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotasadhnkn眉rosha|gotasadhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitasadhn眉rosha|gokitasadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tasadhn眉musha|tasadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotasadhnkn眉musha|gotasadhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitasadhn眉musha|gokitasadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:tasadhsh毛n眉sha|tasadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotasadhnksh毛n眉sha|gotasadhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitasadhsh毛n眉sha|gokitasadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tasadhsh毛rosha|tasadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotasadhnksh毛rosha|gotasadhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitasadhsh毛rosha|gokitasadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tasadhsh毛musha|tasadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotasadhnksh毛musha|gotasadhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitasadhsh毛musha|gokitasadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:tasadhron眉sha|tasadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotasadhnkron眉sha|gotasadhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitasadhron眉sha|gokitasadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:tasadhrosh毛sha|tasadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotasadhnkrosh毛sha|gotasadhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitasadhrosh毛sha|gokitasadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tasadhromusha|tasadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotasadhnkromusha|gotasadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitasadhromusha|gokitasadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:tasadhmun眉sha|tasadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotasadhnkmun眉sha|gotasadhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitasadhmun眉sha|gokitasadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:tasadhmush毛sha|tasadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotasadhnkmush毛sha|gotasadhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitasadhmush毛sha|gokitasadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tasadhmurosha|tasadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotasadhnkmurosha|gotasadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitasadhmurosha|gokitasadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:tasadh|tasadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:t忙s忙dh|t忙s忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hotasadh|hotasadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hot忙s忙dh|hot忙s忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotasadh|hohotasadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohot忙s忙dh|hohot忙s忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉tasadh|n眉tasadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉t忙s忙dh|n眉t忙s忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉tasadh|n眉n眉tasadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉t忙s忙dh|n眉n眉t忙s忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂tasadh|n茂tasadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂t忙s忙dh|n茂t忙s忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂tasadh|n茂n茂tasadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂t忙s忙dh|n茂n茂t忙s忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lutasadh|lutasadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lut忙s忙dh|lut忙s忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutasadh|lulutasadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulut忙s忙dh|lulut忙s忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:litasadh|litasadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lit忙s忙dh|lit忙s忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitasadh|lilitasadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilit忙s忙dh|lilit忙s忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kotasadh|kotasadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kot忙s忙dh|kot忙s忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotasadh|kokotasadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokot忙s忙dh|kokot忙s忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ketasadh|ketasadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ket忙s忙dh|ket忙s忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketasadh|keketasadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keket忙s忙dh|keket忙s忙dh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
